headline: Procter And Gamble Expands Bevel Into Men’s Body Care Segment
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) has expanded its BEVEL brand into men's body care with the launch of its first body cream. The new product focuses on hydration and skin comfort, with a formulation developed for Black men and their specific concerns around dryness and irritation. This marks BEVEL's move beyond grooming into men's skincare and broadens P&G's reach in the men's personal care category. For investors tracking NYSE:PG, this launch sits within P&G's broader consumer products portfolio,...
